name: [YAOC2] Policy Gateway
_fixes: 1: queryReplacement moved from additionalFields to options (Postgres v2.5 correct location)
2: Execute Sandbox Workflow rewritten for executeWorkflow v1.1 passthrough — input assembled in Map to Sandbox
3: Webhook authentication changed to none — X-Gateway-Secret validated in Validate Schema code node
4: Normalise Response reads from $('Map to Sandbox Workflow') not distant $('Evaluate Policy') ancestor
5: Evaluate Policy has explicit null guard on _policy_set
6: Telegram text uses template literal expression for real newlines
7: Write Audit Log (Deny) now includes result_raw column

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'error', message: 'Schema validation failed', errors: $json._gateway.errors }) }}

parameters.query: SELECT id, name, version, defaults, rules FROM yaoc2.policy_sets WHERE name = $1 LIMIT 1

parameters.jsCode:
const item = $('Evaluate Policy').first().json;
return [{ json: { ...item, _gateway: { ...item._gateway, deny_reason: `Action denied by policy rule: ${item._gateway.matched_rule}` } } }];

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'denied', proposed_action_id: $('Build Deny Response').first().json.id, message: $('Build Deny Response').first().json._gateway.deny_reason }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'pending-approval', proposed_action_id: $('Approval Guard').first().json.id, message: 'Action requires approval. Analyst has been notified via Telegram.' }) }}
